zh.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch是Adam de Neufmarché的兒子，於1153年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾阿可。他和Mabilia de Ballon至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1198年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾斯泰可洛斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch是Adam de Neufmarché的儿子，于1153年出生在英国英格兰越可爾阿可。他和Mabilia de Ballon至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1198年之后在英国英格兰越可爾斯泰可洛斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Newmarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Neufmarché (Seine-Maritime). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

variants.name: Newmark
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Chayim, Meyer, Shlomo, Vigdor.
Americanized form of Scandinavian Nymark: habitational name from farms named with ny ‘new’ + mark ‘field’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Neumark  .

variants.name: Anglo-Norman Families
meanings: 2  Norman, English: locative name from Martinvast (in Manche, France). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch was born in 1153, in Arksey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Adam de Neufmarché. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mabilia de Ballon. He died after 1198, in Staincross, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch est né en 1153, à Arksey, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Adam de Neufmarché. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mabilia de Ballon. Il est décédé après 1198, à Staincross, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch wurde 1153 in Arksey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Adam de Neufmarché geboren. Er hatte mit Mabilia de Ballon mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1198 in Staincross, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch è nato il nel 1153 nel Arksey, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Adam de Neufmarché. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mabilia de Ballon. Morì dopo il 1198, nel Staincross, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Newmarchは1153年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルクシーでAdam de Neufmarchéの息子として生まれた。彼はMabilia de Ballonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1198年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスティインクロスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch(은)는 1153년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 아크시에서 Adam de Neufmarché의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mabilia de Ballon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1198년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스테인크로스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch nasceu em 1153, em Arksey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Adam de Neufmarché. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mabilia de Ballon. Ele faleceu após 1198, em Staincross, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch родился в 1153 г. в местности аркси, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Adam de Neufmarché. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mabilia de Ballon. Он умер после 1198 г. в местности стеинкросс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: William de Newmarch nació en 1153, en Arksey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Adam de Neufmarché. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Mabilia de Ballon. Murió después de 1198, en Staincross, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
